title: Driver Teams — Driver My Jobs View
description: Update the driver My Jobs page to show jobs assigned to any team the driver is a member of, in addition to jobs assigned directly. Driver sees all jobs they are responsible for on the selected date.
acceptanceCriteria: Driver sees jobs assigned to their team(s) for the selected date alongside direct assignments
Team name shown on job card when job is assigned via team
Driver can update status and add notes on team-assigned jobs
No change to how directly assigned jobs are displayed
Empty state shown when no direct or team jobs exist for the selected date
implementationNotes: Backend GET /api/jobs for Driver role must return jobs where teamId matches any team the driver is a member of OR assignedDriverId matches the driver
Use Prisma OR query: where: { OR: [{ assignedDriverId: userId }, { team: { members: { some: { userId } } } }] }
Team name displayed as a small badge on the job card e.g. 'Tiimi A'
Do not change dispatcher-facing endpoints in this task
